posts.author: Kelly2E (Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
I’d like to notify my team via Outlook whenever there’s a new item created. However, I can not choose to send an email to an email address that is not in a column. The email should always be sent to the same email address.
How can I achieve this?
Thanks!
